overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a female character walking through an arid desert landscape toward a large industrial warehouse complex. The character traverses rocky terrain and paved surfaces while the camera follows from behind, showcasing distant mountains, power transmission towers, and the stark industrial architecture against the clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open arid desert with distant industrial building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the desert terrain while looking around at the surroundings

entered.detail: large beige industrial building with multiple loading bays visible in the distance
tall metal electricity pylons stretching across the horizon
distant mountain range visible on the horizon under clear sky
sparse low-lying bushes and dry grass scattered across the sandy terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an expansive arid desert landscape under a clear blue sky. Sparse desert vegetation dots the sandy ground while a large industrial warehouse building and power transmission towers are visible in the distance, with mountains framing the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky desert terrain with large boulders

events.description: character climbs up and over a large rock formation in the path

agents.ego_description: navigating over large rocks and boulders scattered across the desert floor

entered.detail: cluster of large boulders and rocky outcrops that the character climbs over

segments.scene_description: The terrain becomes rocky as the character approaches and climbs over large boulders. The industrial building shifts from the right to the left side of the frame as the character navigates the uneven ground, with power lines becoming more prominent in the mid-ground.

events.description: text overlay 'EAST BUILDINGS' appears and ground surface transitions from dirt to paved concrete

agents.ego_description: walking toward the industrial building across the paved yard

entered.detail: large concrete paved area surrounding the industrial building with patches of discoloration
row of dark loading dock doors on the side of the warehouse building

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the industrial complex as the ground transitions from desert dirt to concrete pavement. A text overlay identifies the location as 'EAST BUILDINGS'. The warehouse looms large on the right with its loading bay doors visible, while the rocky terrain falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse exterior and open yard

agents.ego_description: walking alongside the warehouse building and then moving away into the open paved area

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the side of the industrial warehouse, passing the loading bays, then moves away from the building into the expansive paved yard. The building recedes into the distance as the character explores the open concrete area with distant power lines and mountains visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate desert landscape that gradually transitions into a stark industrial complex. It begins with the character traversing an expansive arid plain under a clear blue sky, with distant mountains and power transmission towers framing the horizon. As the character advances, the sandy ground shifts into a rocky terrain of large boulders, causing the industrial warehouse to drift from the right to the left of the frame. The scene then opens onto a concrete pavement identified as East Buildings, where the warehouse looms large on the right with visible loading bay doors. Finally, the camera follows the character as they pass the loading bays and move away from the structure, leaving the building behind to explore an expansive paved yard under the open sky.
